{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Starhammer's design
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] was designed by [[Mell]] with a protective impulse that synergized with his core personality.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“I didn’t program any…affection into him. Just a protective impulse, which synergized with his core personality.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
